codeReview.summary: The feature satisfies the stored-card metadata follow-up: role and damage fields are now persisted into player_matches from both ingest paths, the DB-backed mapper reuses those stored values for /api/stored-matches, and fallback labels still come only from genuinely null persisted/source metadata via buildMatchMetadata. The migration backfills existing rows from match_cache participant data and keeps unsupported INVALID/negative values null, which matches the truthful-fallback requirement. No blocking or non-blocking implementation issues were identified in the reviewed diff.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, skill instructions, and commit f9956dc diff. The implementation adequately fixes DB-first stored-card role/damage persistence, includes a tracked migration/backfill for the live LeagueBack project, and preserves truthful unavailable labels only when source metadata is genuinely missing.
